texts.full_text: thespecificmarkers as neuron-specific enolase (NSE), ferritin, GD2 ganglioside. Imaging include CT-scan, MIGB body-scan and the newest monoclonal antibodies scan. Abdominal tumors are shown in about 75% of children > 12 months old. In 2/3of cases with abdominal neuroblastomas, these originate from retroperitoneum rather than adrenal glands [1].
